<?php namespace Twilio\TwiML; class GenericNode extends TwiML { protected $value; /** * GenericNode constructor. * * @param string $name XML element name * @param ?string $value XML value * @param array $attributes XML attributes */ public function __construct(string $name, ?string $value, array $attributes) { parent::__construct($name, $value, $attributes); $this->name = $name; $this->value = $value; } }
